    • checkGoal

      private UnaryExpression checkGoal()
      Returns null if the goal does not possess the right shape, else it returns the domain.

    • getSubstitute

      private Expression getSubstitute(UnaryExpression domain)
      Returns a cartesian product as substitution for the given domain.

    • computeInput

      public TotalDomRewrites.Input computeInput()
      Compute the input for the tactic. It returns null if the goal does not possess the right shape, or if the domain cannot be substituted by a Cartesian product, else it returns an input.
